text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down sharply over the past day—BTC at -4.1% and ETH at -5.4%—signaling a broad selloff across major assets. The Fear & Greed Index sits at 23 (Extreme Fear) with no improvement over the week, indicating sustained pessimism and capitulation-level sentiment among traders. Volume at $76B remains moderate, and Bitcoin dominance holding steady at 56% suggests holders are rotating into BTC as a relative safe haven rather than fleeing crypto entirely.
